name: Video Game Logic
white: Respawning in the middle of the school play.
Blaming lag for missing the school bus.
A loading screen stuck at 99% since Tuesday.
Trying to pause an online match because Grandma said dinner.
Speedrunning bedtime in under forty seconds.
An escort mission where the NPC walks directly into the lake.
An inventory holding 400 apples and zero keys.
Rage-quitting Go Fish.
A tutorial pop-up for flushing the toilet.
Accepting a side quest from Mom without reading it first.
Saving the game right before talking to the principal.
Walking into a stranger's house and smashing all their pots.
Taking fall damage from the bottom bunk.
An invisible wall at the edge of the backyard.
Grinding for six hours to unlock a slightly different hat.
A villager who says the same three sentences forever.
Button-mashing the microwave.
A treasure chest that is obviously a mimic.
A checkpoint right before the dentist's chair.
T-posing at the family reunion.
An extra life hidden under the couch cushions.
Punching a tree until it becomes a house.
A banana peel placed with deadly precision at the top of the stairs.
The water level. Nobody likes the water level.
A quest marker floating over the dirty dishes.
A loot box containing one (1) butterscotch candy.
A boss battle against the vacuum cleaner.
An unskippable cutscene of Dad explaining taxes.
Auto-saving every time Mom uses my full name.
Crouch-walking past my parents' bedroom in stealth mode.

black.text: Sorry I'm late — I couldn't leave my room until I defeated _.
The final boss of elementary school is _.
You can't save the game during _.
A new side quest just appeared over Mom's head: "_."
My character can defeat a thousand skeletons, but nothing prepared me for _.
The rarest achievement in our house, earned by 0.1% of players: _.
The new update to recess adds _ and removes _.
